name: RFM-Editing 2: Text-Guided Audio Editing with Rectified Flow Matching and Coarse-to-Fine Diffusion Transformers

description: arXiv:2606.20101v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Audio editing aims to modify specific content in an existing audio clip according to a text instruction or description while preserving the remaining acoustic content. Despite the remarkable progress of diffusion models, existing training-based editing methods mainly rely on the local inductive biases and cross-attention interaction in c...
author: Liting Gao, Yonggang Zhu, Yaru Chen, Dongyu Wang, Shubin Zhang, Zhenbo Li, Jean-Yves Guillemaut, Wenwu Wang
